name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids and Appliances (ADIP Scheme)
description: Assistance scheme that helps eligible persons with disabilities obtain durable, modern, and scientifically manufactured aids and appliances.

benefit.amount: Varies by device and income category
benefit.description: Eligible beneficiaries may receive aids and appliances free of cost or with a prescribed contribution, subject to current ADIP norms.

other_conditions: Applicant needs a valid disability certificate or UDID and must meet the medical, income, and device-prescription conditions for the requested aid.

application.portal: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
application.deadline: Check local assessment-camp or implementing-agency schedule

benefits.financial: Device assistance varies by income category and prescribed aid
non_financial: Mobility, hearing, vision, and rehabilitation support

ai_explanation.summary: Support for eligible persons with disabilities needing prescribed aids or appliances.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm your disability certificate, medical assessment, and the local implementing-agency process.
common_rejection_reasons: Requested device not recommended after assessment
tips: Carry prior prescriptions and mobility or hearing assessments to the evaluation.
next_steps: Contact the local implementing agency or assessment camp.

source.organization: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities

name: Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Scholarship support for eligible students with benchmark disabilities pursuing recognised school, post-matric, or higher-education courses under the applicable central scholarship component.

benefit.amount: Varies by course and scholarship component
benefit.description: Maintenance allowance, disability allowance, and other support vary by the applicable scholarship category and current guidelines.

other_conditions: Applicant must have the required disability certification and meet the income, course, institution, and scholarship-component conditions.

application.deadline: Check the current National Scholarship Portal schedule

benefits.financial: Varies by course and scholarship component

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Subject to document and institute verification

ai_explanation.summary: Education support for eligible students with disabilities pursuing recognised studies.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm your disability certificate, family income, scholarship component, and institution eligibility on the National Scholarship Portal.
tips: Ensure that the name on your disability and bank documents matches the scholarship application.
frequently_asked_questions: Can students apply through the National Scholarship Portal?
next_steps: Review the applicable disability scholarship listing on NSP.
Upload verified academic, income, and disability documents.

source.organization: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
